chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. High Court Appeal No.273 of 2008 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of CMA 191/2018. 2. For hearing of CMA 1665/2008. 3. For regular hearing. 20.01.2025. None present...... Since last few dates the appellants are not being represented by the counsel and there is no one either to hold brief for the appellants. Dismissed for non-prosecution alonwith listed applications. Chief Justice Judge Ayub
